creator: decke@bluelife.at
text:
- Update to 0.22
- mythbackend startscript rewritten
- enabled ivtv with patch from <usleepless at gmail.com>

Many thanks to Torfinn Ingolfsen and usleepless for testing
and improving MythTV on FreeBSD.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-libs__libmythtv__videodev_myth.h
- files/patch-libs__libmythtv__videoout_ivtv.cpp
- files/patch-programs__mythtranscode__mpeg2fix.cpp
- files/patch-qt3style-includes.diff

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-libs__libmyth__compat.h
- files/patch-libs__libmyth__libmyth.pro
- files/patch-libs__libmyth__util.cpp
- files/patch-libs__libmythdvdnav__dvd_input.c
- files/patch-libs__libmythdvdnav__dvdnav_internal.h
- files/patch-libs__libmythfreemheg__Programs.cpp
- files/patch-libs__libmythtv__cardutil.cpp
- files/patch-libs__libmythtv__libmythtv.pro
- files/patch-libs__libmythupnp__httprequest.cpp
- files/patch-programs__mythbackend__mainserver.cpp
- files/patch-programs__mythbackend__scheduler.cpp
- files/patch-programs__mythfrontend__main.cpp
- files/patch-programs__mythtranscode__mythtranscode.pro
- files/patch-programs__mythtv-setup__backendsettings.cpp

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
